title: Metamorphose – Overgrowing Hate
description:
Video Segment: 0:55-1:20
Flowers grow when a new toxic word is detected.
The type of the toxic word is encoded by the type of flower.

visualChannels.comment: The shape and material of the flower, corresponds to the type of toxic word. However, it's a quite abstract mapping.

contextualAttributes.comment: The animation effect of the growth of the flowers.
The flowers are place like a plant or bouquet.
